title: Daily Briefing
bestFor: Start the day with calendar, reminders, mail, and recent notes.
prompt: Brief me on today's calendar, overdue reminders, unread mail, and recent notes.
safety: Read-only by default. Saving a note or reminder becomes a separate approved action.

title: Inbox Triage
bestFor: Turn mail backlog into a small, reviewable set of follow-up tasks.
prompt: Find emails from Alex about the project and create reminders for action items.
safety: Reads mail first; reminder creation is a per-call write path and stays auditable.

title: Meeting Prep
bestFor: Collect the context you need before the next meeting.
prompt: For my next meeting, find related notes, contacts, files, and reminders.
safety: Read-only prep flow. Creating agendas or tasks is an explicit follow-up write.

title: Project Digest
bestFor: Summarize active project context across indexed Apple workspace data.
prompt: Summarize what changed since yesterday on my current project.
safety: Digest is read-only after indexing; indexing writes only to AirMCP's local semantic store.

title: Focus Blocks
bestFor: Turn open reminders into calendar time blocks.
prompt: Plan focus blocks for today's open reminders, but ask before creating each event.
safety: Calendar event creation is non-destructive but non-idempotent; each event is auditable.

title: Research to Output
bestFor: Move from Safari, files, and notes into a draft note or email.
prompt: Open the Apple developer docs in Safari, summarize the page, and draft a note.
safety: Reading and summarizing are read-only. Sending or saving output is a separate write action.
